sentences.english: I got my first part-time job at a convenience store last month.
I work every Saturday from ten to five.
My main job is stocking shelves and working the cash register.
sentences.korean: 주요 업무는 물건 진열과 계산대 업무예요.

sentences.english: It was hard at first but now I enjoy talking to customers.
sentences.korean: 처음에는 힘들었지만 이제 손님들과 대화하는 게 즐거워요.

sentences.english: I'm saving the money I earn to buy a new laptop for college.
sentences.korean: 버는 돈을 모아서 대학용 새 노트북을 살 거예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
